title: Improve handling of worker cancellation
message:
Improve handling of worker cancellation

If we keep running our code, but the worker gets cancelled, the system may freeze our code execution making notifications hang.

Also, it may cause the code to run more than once at roughly the same time, because the system reschedules our worker.

title: Add InstalledAppsCache and show apps with issues
message:
Add InstalledAppsCache and show apps with issues

in the My Apps list, we are now showing apps with issues such as incompatible signer. The install cache can be used to indicate that apps are installed.

title: Fix more accessibility issues with screen readers
message: Fix more accessibility issues with screen readers

title: Fix back navigation for main bottom nav bar destinations
message: Fix back navigation for main bottom nav bar destinations

title: Fix issue where search would open all the time on its own
message:
Fix issue where search would open all the time on its own

on certain older phones. Upstream issue: https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/445720462

title: Workaround another installer bug
message:
Workaround another installer bug

When the user tries to install an incompatible app, certain Android versions don't send us the error broadcast. So we think the user simply clicked outside the confirmation dialog and ask again, leading to a UI dialog loop. As a simple workaround we use a counter and bail out after showing the dialog three times.

title: Properly parse description URLs enclosed in round brackets
message: Properly parse description URLs enclosed in round brackets

title: Try to fix molecule issues
message:
Try to fix molecule issues

We were running the presenting on the IoDispatcher and this seemed to have caused random crashes.

title: Add 'show app info' action to app not available dialog
message:
Add 'show app info' action to app not available dialog

also start all activities safely

title: Enable D8/proguard for release builds
message: Enable D8/proguard for release builds

title: Show technical info in app details
message: Show technical info in app details

title: Mark installed apps everywhere
message:
Mark installed apps everywhere

and load their icon locally and not from the internet

title: Show most downloaded apps on discover screen
message: Show most downloaded apps on discover screen

title: Use assisted inject for ViewModels rather than LaunchedEffect
message:
Use assisted inject for ViewModels rather than LaunchedEffect

The advantage is that the information to be passed to the ViewModel is known at construction time and is final. So no issues with mutable values and potentially calling settings multiple times. The passed info defines the identity of the ViewModel.

title: Allow hiding of found app issues
message:
Allow hiding of found app issues

This hides only the current version code, so if an update with a higher version code also has an issue it will be shown again. This may be desirable especially for known vulnerabilities.

title: Add phrase queries for better search results
message: Add phrase queries for better search results

title: Fix proguard error about "no primary constructor"
message:
Fix proguard error about "no primary constructor"

and add an instrumentation test for it

We also tried fixing this via consumer rules in the database library, but failed.

title: [db] Migration to version 10
message:
[db] Migration to version 10

adds a couple of fields we wanted for some time:
* isPrimary for mirrors
* repo errors
* app labels for pre-approved installs

title: [db] track and clear repo update errors
message:
[db] track and clear repo update errors

Historically, we've just shown a giant Toast for repo update errors, now we track them in the DB, so we can properly expose them in the UI.

title: [db] don't progress report total bytes for entry.jar download
message:
[db] don't progress report total bytes for entry.jar download

because we'll download another file afterwards and progress reporting would jump to 100% two times. Also entry.jar is really small, so downloading that is fast and doesn't benefit from detailed progress reporting anyway.

title: [db] add missing API surface
message: [db] add missing API surface

message: Show repo update errors in the UI

message: Add new categories

message: Add debugging statements and clean up ForegroundInfo

message: Support dynamic colors, but keep brand colors as default

title: Warn user before downloading over metered connection
message: Warn user before downloading over metered connection

title: Require opt-in to screenshot loading on mobile data
message: Require opt-in to screenshot loading on mobile data

title: Show progress bar on first start
message:
Show progress bar on first start

also track repo update progress

title: Improve repo update notification
message: Improve repo update notification

title: Show repo update progress on repo details screen
message:
Show repo update progress on repo details screen

and show update button more prominently

title: Don't load updates on very first start
message:
Don't load updates on very first start

it may find apps we had installed before, but are not (yet) in any repo, so it will show issues already during initial repo fetch

title: Handle offline or metered network on first start
message:
Handle offline or metered network on first start

by informing the user about the situation and delaying initial repo update until they are ready

title: Remove cached APKs after 24h
message:
Remove cached APKs after 24h

the clean up is piggybacking on repo updates

title: Allow updates even on metered connections
message:
Allow updates even on metered connections

For this, the update toggles in settings are replaced with a ListPreference with three states: only on wifi, always and never.

title: Upgrade dependencies
message: Upgrade dependencies

message: Fix some issues the new linter complained about

title: Improve adaptive navigation
message:
Improve adaptive navigation

Shows a NavigationRail on big screens now and uses separate back stacks for main nav destinations

title: Improve big screen pages when no app/repo is selected
message: Improve big screen pages when no app/repo is selected

title: Improve repository details
message:
Improve repository details

better copy and metered dialog when enabling repo while metered

title: Improve inset padding for lists
message:
Improve inset padding for lists

The secret is to use contentPadding, not padding with the Modifier.

title: Move 'All Apps' to main overflow menu for now
message: Move 'All Apps' to main overflow menu for now

title: Turn 'My apps' overflow menu into sort menu
message: Turn 'My apps' overflow menu into sort menu

title: Fix state restoration on top level screens
message:
Fix state restoration on top level screens

by reworking the NavDisplay related code

title: Improve presentation of main Discover screen
message: Improve presentation of main Discover screen

title: Improve About screen
message: Improve About screen

title: Update our own app last
message:
Update our own app last

This is needed, because when we update ourselves we get killed, so then we can't apply the other updates anymore. Updating ourselves last ensures that all other updates have been applied before.

title: Init repo update progress as soon as possible
message:
Init repo update progress as soon as possible

so there can be UI feedback right after we started updating that repo not after the first bytes have been downloaded which may only happen after significant delay.

message: Clean up app gradle modules

title: Clean up resources across old and new code
message: Clean up resources across old and new code

message:
Change last update check key

because the Int/Long issue in the preference lib doesn't seem to get resolved in time

message: Adapt CI to new module structure

message: Only show one app confirmation dialog at a time

message: Update update-mirrors-in-default_repos.xml.py

message: Allow one more year of SHA1 in index v1 tests

message: Remove 2.0 dev cruft

title: Adapt nightly builds to 2.0 basic
message: Adapt nightly builds to 2.0 basic

title: Don't claim no apps installed when all apps have issues
message: Don't claim no apps installed when all apps have issues

title: Handle disabled pre-approval
message:
Handle disabled pre-approval

Pre-approval can be disabled and we get STATUS_FAILURE_BLOCKED which should be sufficient. There's also a hidden official error code we don't use for now:
https://cs.android.com/android/platform/superproject/+/android-latest-release:frameworks/base/core/java/android/content/pm/PackageManager.java;l=2644;drc=905556173324d48059d4bae77408748a76497ac9

title: Fix top spacer when changing repos in app details
message: Fix top spacer when changing repos in app details

title: Show changelog of update (if existing) in app details
message:
Show changelog of update (if existing) in app details

previously only the changelog of the last installed version would get shown

title: Don't keep retrying sending ACRA reports
message:
Don't keep retrying sending ACRA reports

we send via email intent. this typically doesn't fail. if it fails, usually because there's no email program installed and then we shouldn't keep trying

title: Use proper Litecoin icon
message:
Use proper Litecoin icon

otherwise it looks strange if Bitcoin and Litecoin use the same icon

title: Only show repo errors if the repo is enabled
message:
Only show repo errors if the repo is enabled

this allows "ignoring" repo errors by disabling the repo

title: Make repo error text selectable
message:
Make repo error text selectable

so it can easily get copy and pasted

title: Remove int preferences hack, because library now supports Long
message: Remove int preferences hack, because library now supports Long

title: Take signer into account when finding installed version in app details
message:
Take signer into account when finding installed version in app details

and multiple candidates with the same version code exist

title: Improve behavior of updating our own app last
message:
Improve behavior of updating our own app last

Now our own app will show as in progress of getting updated. No more 'Update all' button will be shown after it has been pressed already.

title: Move new strings into a separate file
message:
Move new strings into a separate file

so they are not exposed to translators until they've undergone review

message: Reload updates after deleting a repository

message:
Adapt strings according to material design 3 guidelines

message: Simplify dynamic feature graphic handling

Close search results when selecting an app

message:
Treat old crash reports differently

Implement custom search screen

Don't show issue for apps with incompatible signer installed by other stores

The other store is likely to provide updates and this is a common use case with Aurora or Google Play, so people get flagged false positives.
